name: claude-agent-archetypes
description: Boris Cherny's five product-engineering archetypes as ready-to-use Claude agents

plugins.name: code-archetypes
plugins.description: All five archetypes (Prototyper, Builder, Sweeper, Grower, Maintainer) as Claude Code subagents for software work

plugins.name: knowledge-archetypes
plugins.description: Prototyper, Sweeper, and Grower as agents for knowledge work (content, systems, funnels); Builder and Maintainer deliberately excluded, see README
